meta.title: How SpaceX Is Upgrading Raptor To Be The Ultimate Rocket Engine!
meta.description:
Today we’re going to do a quick rundown on all the known changes we’ve seen with Raptor to date. We’ll go over their thrust and performance, how to spot the changes with their external designs, and talk about how we expect to see this engine continue to evolve.

If you’re more of a reader, here’s an article version of this video as well! - https://everydayastronaut.com/spacex-raptor-engine-comparison/

Timestamps:
00:00 - Intro
01:50 - Overview of Raptor
06:05 - The Differences
10:30 - Their Specifications
14:50 - The Future Of Raptor

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
